title: Renaissance Scholarship
html:
Renaissance Scholarship

The Renaissance Scholarship is one of the three pillars of the funding stack Yahir assembled for OSU: alongside Ford and Al Forthan, it forms the "Renaissance + Ford + Al Forthan" triad named explicitly in 2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo. The administrative point-of-contact across the surfaced corpus is Jann, with Diana Hoff as a parallel/affiliated name.

The summer-2021 stress-arc: in the June 14 dave fafsa note, 18yo Yahir opens but abandons mid-sentence the email "Hey Jann, I am sending this email regarding my stance on the Renaissance Scholarship. After thoroughly..." — the half-drafted-letter genre at peak form. Three weeks later in the July 6 gratitude letter he completes the thank-you. The arc is owe → draft → drift → finally write — the same pattern Yahir runs with Brenda and other mentor-figures.

The scholarship's downstream effect is funding the OSU freshman year — by Dec 2021 (2021 12 14 mom dad christmas gift ideas) Yahir is home from his first term, the funding having delivered.
